problem.footer: Most companies don't have a product problem; they have a technical integration problem.

faq.headline: TECHNICAL
faq.subline: Direct answers about our strategic infrastructure.
faq.q1: How do the 3 pillars integrate in practice?
faq.a1: We operate in the technical fusion of Acquisition (Marketing), Architecture (IT), and Conversion (Sales). When these areas share the same data intelligence, margin leakage is eliminated.
faq.q2: My operation is already large, how does Respect help?
faq.a2: We focus on companies that have reached an operational ceiling. We implement elite processes so that growth doesn't generate technical chaos or loss of profitability.
faq.q3: How does Respect use Artificial Intelligence?
faq.a3: We use AI for predictive lead qualification and orchestrated business automations, ensuring the sales team focuses only on real opportunities.
faq.q4: How do you ensure data security?
faq.a4: We implement end-to-end encryption protocols, server shielding, and full compliance (GDPR/LGPD) to protect your business intelligence.
faq.q5: My marketing and sales don't talk. Do you solve this?
faq.a5: Yes. We eliminate data silos by creating a single technical layer where marketing feeds sales with surgical precision.
faq.q6: Do I need to change my current tools?
faq.a6: We are modular. Our engineering can integrate and optimize your current stack (CRM/Site) or implement a new high-performance structure if necessary.
faq.q7: Why is IT considered strategic here?
faq.a7: Slow or unstable technology costs revenue. At Respect, IT is the resilient foundation that supports uninterrupted revenue flow.
faq.q8: What's the difference compared to common agencies?
faq.a8: We aren't just a lead agency. We are execution engineers who take responsibility for your company's complete profit infrastructure.
faq.a9: It's our set of protocols ensuring your digital ecosystem handles traffic peaks and invasion attempts without stopping sales for a second.
faq.q10: How does the free diagnostic work?
faq.a10: A 30-minute technical session where we audit your main infrastructure bottlenecks and indicate the fastest path to efficiency 4.0.

lgpd.modal_text: To view our infrastructure and ensure technical rigor, we use performance and security cookies. By accepting, you agree to our technical and commercial data processing protocol.

privacy.title: PRIVACY POLICY
privacy.subtitle: Respect Data Processing Protocol - MS Group
privacy.section1_text: We collect technical data (Cookies, IP) and contact data (WhatsApp/Form) strictly for Technical Diagnostic and Scale Engineering purposes.
privacy.section2_text: Information is used to optimize the Conversion Architecture, prevent efficiency leaks, and personalize the delivery of our 3 pillars.
privacy.section3_text: Your data is protected by end-to-end encryption and stored in resilient cloud infrastructure (AWS/GCP), following the highest systemic security standards.
privacy.section4_text: In compliance with GDPR/LGPD, you have full rights to access, rectify, and delete your data at any time via our official channels.
